---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're running into. Example: "When I store more than 10k episodic memories, retrieval latency degrades because..."

## What would you like?

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as you can — API shape, config option, behaviour change, etc.

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] Core engine (`cogdb/core.py`, `cogdb_engine/`)
- [ ] Framework adapters (`cogdb/adapters/`)
- [ ] Schema system (`cogdb/schema/`)
- [ ] Retrieval pipeline (`cogdb/pipeline/`)
- [ ] Benchmarks (`benchmarks/`)
- [ ] Docs / examples

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why do you prefer your proposed solution?

## Would you like to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes — I'm happy to open a PR
- [ ] No — I'm filing this for someone else to pick up
